calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-29-2014 Off Calendar

Motion To Request Default Prove Up Hearing Date
Off Calendar Dec-04-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

David Francis Perry, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, WELLS FARGO BANK, NATINAL ASSOCIATION.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) PACIFIC CUSTOM FLOORING, a partnership; ROMAN RECHEBSKIY; ALEX RECHEVSKIY; DIMA RECHEBSKIY, aka DMITRY RECHEVSKIY.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1- 20 dismissed without prejudice.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $46,255.54
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $0.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $46,255.54
Judgment signed in open court.

Off Calendar Sep-02-2014 Continued To Jan-14-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
